creator: eugen@freebsd.org
text:
Closed prematurely.

I update ports tree as a whole and I am active portupgrade user. I never use "pkg upgrade" and seldom install the software using pre-built packages.

I use ports tree with "make install" to install new software. This is supported way.

libyang was installed as dependency for some other port long time ago without me knowing anything about libyang. And when I install frr7 using ports, I expect installation process to behave.
